data.title: Weight Loss Drug Wars Heat Up: Amgen Challenges Eli Lilly, Novo's Dominance
data.description: Amgen's new obesity drug, MariTide, shows promise against giants Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk, but faces tough competition in a $100B market.

data.title: Trump's Tariff Plan Risks Economic Pain For North America, Goldman Sachs Warns
data.description: Goldman Sachs warns that Trump's proposed 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico could cause economic turmoil, with GDP shrinkage and inflation.

data.title: AT&T Revises 2024 Guidance, Targets $22 Billion Annual Capital Investment Through 2027 & More
data.description: AT&T is focusing on modernizing its 5G network and expanding its broadband network. It also updated its financial targets, including a $10 billion share repurchase plan and over $50 billion in financial capacity over the next three years.

data.title: Microchip Slashes Q3 Revenue Guidance, Issues Restructuring Plan
data.description: Microchip Tech lowers revenue guidance for Dec. 2024 quarter, announces manufacturing restructuring plans due to high inventory and slow orders.

data.title: A Look at ChargePoint Hldgs's Upcoming Earnings Report
